name: Holy Fire Meow Meow: Special Forces
short_description: "Holy Fire Meow Meow: Special Forces" is a top-down shooting game featuring cats as the main characters. You will play as Elusa, a special forces soldier from the feline tribe, infiltrating enemy territory to defeat the forces and rescue your trapped comrades!
detailed_description:
"Holy Fire Meow Meow: Special Forces" is a top-down shooting game featuring cats as the main characters. You will play as Elusa, a special forces soldier from the feline tribe, infiltrating enemy territory to defeat the forces and rescue your trapped comrades!
A group of unknown terrorists has kidnapped the residents of Cat Town. The Cat Headquarters orders you to embark on a rescue mission immediately! Destroy their camps and lead your fellow cats to the helicopter landing point. Headquarters will send a helicopter to assist you! You can use pistols, rifles, and other firearms to shoot the enemies, or use explosives like mines and rocket launchers to blow them up. Beware of the armored units in the enemy camp—they are deadly! Additionally, you might find useful weapons in the tents where your fellow cats are held!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Danish, Russian, Norwegian, Japanese, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
